meaning: 麦金利山[美国阿拉斯加州中南部] (即德纳里峰
examples: Mt. McKinley, in Alaska, is the highest mountain in North America.
He slapped Mrs. McKinley on the face.
Mrs. McKinley waved and locked the door.
Struggling with the idea of having a child, McKinley ultimately decided to terminate her pregnancy.
Too many Republicans in power have begun to act like descendants of old McKinley-era protectionists.
